## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss community-related topics, content strategy, and website improvements for AI-led Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritize improving the user journey on Circle, focusing on gating content behind free registration](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Develop a more enticing "become a member" page with preview content to drive sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Create tiered access levels (unregistered, free, paid) with appropriate content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Implement a strategy to capture email addresses from workshop attendees and content viewers](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

## Topics

### Content Distribution and Analytics

  - [YouTube content performing well, but TikTok experiencing unexplained drop in engagement](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Need to investigate TikTok analytics and potentially adjust posting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Suggestion to implement a strategic follow campaign on TikTok to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Website and Community Platform Improvements

  - [Current website structure bypasses AILagrowth.com, sending users directly to Circle](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need to create a smoother journey from website to community platform](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Develop tiered access levels: unregistered, free registered, and paid members](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Design an improved "become a member" page with content previews to drive sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Implement gating on workshop recordings and other valuable content to require email registration](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

### Workshop Production

  - [Upcoming workshop to be held in the office with Guy, Jason, and Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Will to set up equipment on Thursday for Friday's workshop](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Exploring potential use of Sora 2 AI for creating product marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### Podcast Guest Roadmap

  - [Need to improve scheduling and commitment process for podcast guests](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Utilize existing contact list and warm introductions](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Develop a system to better schedule and commit to recording dates](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Founding Member Initiative

  - [New member page coded and awaiting content approval](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Need to review and finalize member list for invitations](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate TikTok analytics drop and adjust strategy accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Create mock-ups for improved "become a member" page with preview content](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Implement content gating on Circle to require free registration for access](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [Review and approve new member page content](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Finalize founding member list and begin sending invitations](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Develop a trailer for workshops once Guy's session is recorded](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [Audit and adjust access levels across all Circle spaces to align with new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rfPohm9vKUP-bPhB9jRUVJsyVrJ6ckn3?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
